instance GreenhouseEnvironmentalSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental sensors monitoring greenhouse conditions (temperature, humidity, light) for behavioral adaptation of the physical greenhouse and its Digital Twin."

]

instance RaspberryPiAirQualitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi equipped with sensors measuring indoor air quality parameters (CO2, particulate matter, humidity, temperature) for real-time data acquisition in the Air Quality Management Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:producedData AirQualitySensorDataTransmitted
]

instance GantryCranePositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Positional sensors (encoders) on the lab-scale gantry crane providing real-time kinematic state data (joint angles, payload position) for digital twin synchronization."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GantryCraneKinematicDataTransmitted
]

instance GantryCraneMotionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motion sensors (e.g., accelerometers, gyroscopes) tracking dynamic behavior (velocity, acceleration, swinging motion) of the gantry crane payload."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GantryCraneDynamicDataTransmitted
]

instance GantryCraneLoadSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Load sensors monitoring payload weight and distribution for real-time operational constraints enforcement in the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GantryCraneLoadDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance GreenhouseEnvironmentalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GreenhouseEnvironmentalSensor
]

instance AirQualitySensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom RaspberryPiAirQualitySensor
]

instance GantryCraneKinematicDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GantryCranePositionSensor
]

instance GantryCraneDynamicDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GantryCraneMotionSensor
]

instance GantryCraneLoadDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GantryCraneLoadSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance GreenhouseBehavioralAdaptationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral adaptation model for the greenhouse Digital Twin, enabling real-time adjustments to environmental control parameters based on sensor feedback."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo InfluxDBTimeSeriesEnabler, ActiveMQMessageBrokerEnabler
]

instance AirQualitySimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "AutomationML-based digital twin model for predictive air quality dynamics simulation, including geometric layouts, airflow behaviors, and virus spread prediction."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AutomationMLEngineEnabler, AzureCloudPipelineEnabler
]

instance GantryCraneKinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Parametric kinematic model of the lab-scale gantry crane, including joint limits, payload capacity, and motion trajectories for real-time control optimization."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROSKinematicSolverEnabler, FreeCADModelingEnabler
]

instance GantryCranePhysicsSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Physics-based simulation model for crane dynamics, including payload swinging motion and collision avoidance, implemented in Gazebo/Ignition."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GazeboSimulationEnabler, ROSControlFrameworkEnabler
]

instance GreenhouseEnvironmentalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series environmental data (temperature, humidity, light) collected from greenhouse sensors, stored in InfluxDB for behavioral adaptation analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GreenhouseEnvironmentalDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo InfluxDBTimeSeriesEnabler
]

instance AirQualityMeasurementData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time air quality measurements (CO2, particulate matter, humidity) collected from Raspberry Pi sensors, processed via Azure cloud pipelines."

    DTDFVocab:inputTo AzureCloudPipelineEnabler
]

instance GantryCraneKinematicStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "High-frequency kinematic state data (joint angles, positions) from crane sensors, used for real-time trajectory validation and control optimization."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GantryCraneKinematicDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROSKinematicSolverEnabler, TimescaleDBStorageEnabler
]

instance GantryCraneDynamicStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Dynamic state data (velocity, acceleration, payload motion) from crane motion sensors, enabling real-time synchronization with physics simulations."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GantryCraneDynamicDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GazeboSimulationEnabler, ROSControlFrameworkEnabler
]

instance GantryCraneLoadStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Payload load data (weight, distribution) from crane load sensors, used for operational constraint enforcement and fault detection."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GantryCraneLoadDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROSControlFrameworkEnabler
]

instance GantryCraneHistoricalTrajectoryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Historical trajectory data logged from crane operations, stored in TimescaleDB for performance benchmarking and model validation."

]

// C11: Enablers

]

]

]

]

instance ROSKinematicSolverEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS-based kinematic solver for forward/inverse kinematics calculations of the gantry crane, enabling real-time trajectory planning."
    DTDFVocab:enables GantryCraneOptimalControlService, GantryCraneDataVisualizationService
]

]

]

instance ROSControlFrameworkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

    DTDFVocab:enables GantryCraneOptimalControlService, GantryCraneFaultDetectionService
]

instance TimescaleDBStorageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

    DTDFVocab:enables GantryCraneHistoricalDataLoggingService, GantryCraneContinuousValidationService
]

instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

    DTDFVocab:enables GantryCranePhysicalToVirtualInteractionService
]

instance PythonScriptingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python scripting environment with NumPy/SciPy for implementing custom control algorithms and data processing pipelines."
    DTDFVocab:enables GantryCraneOptimalControlService, GantryCraneFaultDetectionService
]

instance RVizVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RViz 3D visualization tool for real-time rendering of crane kinematics and dynamics with interactive telemetry overlays."

]

instance FlaskDashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Flask-based web dashboard for remote monitoring of crane operations with customizable views and anomaly highlighting."
    DTDFVocab:enables GantryCraneDataVisualizationService
]

instance MachineLearningEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python machine learning libraries (scikit-learn, TensorFlow) for implementing anomaly detection and predictive maintenance algorithms."
    DTDFVocab:enables GantryCraneFaultDetectionService
]

]

// C6: Services

    base:desc "Service enabling real-time behavioral adaptation of the greenhouse Digital Twin by adjusting environmental control parameters based on sensor feedback and time-series analysis."

]

]

]

instance GantryCraneOptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [

]

instance GantryCraneFaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [

]

instance GantryCraneSystemEvolutionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service tracking evolutionary changes to the digital twin using DarTwin notation for model versioning, rollbacks, and impact analysis."

]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The **Virtual-to-Physical Interaction** in the Digital Twin system is mediated by the **Control Application** and **Trajectory Generator Service**, which translate digital commands into physical actions for the **Physical Crane**. Key details include:
  - **Command Types**: Optimized **trajectories** (generated by the **Trajectory Generator Service**) with no residual swinging motion at the end, ensuring precise puck placement.
  - **Control Message Formats**: Implicitly structured as **kinematic commands** (e.g., position/velocity profiles) transmitted via the **Physical Crane Interface** (Python-based) to the crane controllers.
  - **Validation and Authentication Mechanisms**: Not explicitly detailed, but the **Continuous Validation Service** implicitly validates trajectory execution by comparing real-time physical performance (from the **Logging Application**) against simulated trajectories (from the **Simulation Service**). Alerts are generated if thresholds are breached.
  - **Feedback Systems**: The **Logging Application** continuously streams crane state data back to the **Database**, enabling closed-loop feedback. The **Dashboard** provides real-time visualization for operators to monitor performance.
  - **Conflict Resolution**: Not explicitly described, but the **Control Application** likely prioritizes commands based on system state (e.g., avoiding collisions by validating trajectories against the **Simulation Service**).
  - **Command Execution Confirmation**: Implied via the **Continuous Validation Service**, which cross-references executed trajectories with simulations and notifies operators of discrepancies through the **Dashboard**."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin systems in the provided exemplars follow an **ad-hoc, lightweight orchestration pattern** without reliance on commercial Digital Twin frameworks. The **GreenhouseDT** exemplar employs a **monolithic, service-integrated architecture** comprising:
  - **InfluxDB** (time-series database) for data persistence,
  - **ActiveMQ** (message broker) for asynchronous communication between components,
  - **Virtual Machines (VMs)** preloaded with prerecorded data to simulate real-time behavioral adaptation.
  The **Air Quality Management** exemplar uses a **hybrid pipeline** integrating:
  - **Raspberry Pi + sensors** (physical layer),
  - **AutomationML-based Digital Twin** (modeling layer),
  - **Microsoft Azure tools** (cloud-based processing for runtime visualization, simulation, and prediction).
  Orchestration is **implicitly handled via scripted workflows** (e.g., GitHub-hosted setup instructions) rather than formal Digital Twin frameworks. The **gantry crane system** (described via **C4 Model**) suggests a **modular software architecture** but lacks explicit details on orchestration. **No centralized controller, microservices mesh, or dynamic resource management** (e.g., Kubernetes, edge-cloud coordination) is documented. The exemplars prioritize **domain-specific adaptability** over standardized Digital Twin constellations, using **containerization/virtualization** for reproducibility but not for scalable orchestration."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The **GreenhouseDT** exemplar emphasizes **self-adaptive behavioral fidelity**, where both the physical greenhouse and its digital twin dynamically adjust based on real-world conditions. Validation is implicit via **prerecorded data** in virtual machines, enabling offline testing of model accuracy. The **Air Quality Management** exemplar employs **runtime visualization, simulation, and prediction** as validation methods, with **AutomationML** ensuring model consistency. Uncertainty quantification is not explicitly detailed, but the use of **Microsoft Azure tools** suggests integration with cloud-based analytics for error detection. The **lab-scale gantry crane** lacks specific fidelity metrics, though its **C4 Model** architecture implies modular validation of subsystems. Quality assurance processes are ad-hoc across exemplars, with no mention of formal verification methods (e.g., model checking, calibration protocols)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The **Digital Twin Technical Connection** infrastructure relies on a **service-oriented architecture** with the following technical specifics:
  - **Communication Protocols**:
    - **MQTT** for inter-service signaling (e.g., between the **Trajectory Generator Service**, **Simulation Service**, and **Continuous Validation Service**).
    - Implicit **Python-based protocols** (e.g., TCP/IP, serial) for **Physical Crane Interface** ↔ **Control Application** and **Logging Application** ↔ **Database**.
  - **Network Topology and Architecture**: Centralized with a **TimescaleDB** database as the core data store, connected to services via the **MQTT Broker**. The **Dashboard** (Grafana) visualizes data from the database, suggesting a **star topology** for data access.
  - **Bandwidth and Latency Requirements**:
    - **Low-latency** (<100ms) for real-time trajectory validation (critical for the **Continuous Validation Service**).
    - **High-bandwidth** for continuous logging of crane state data (e.g., time-series sensor data in **TimescaleDB**).
  - **Reliability and Redundancy Mechanisms**: Not explicitly detailed, but the **Continuous Validation Service** implies redundancy in trajectory validation (simulation vs. execution comparison). The **MQTT Broker** may support message persistence for critical commands.
  - **Security Protocols**: Not specified, but inferred to include:
    - **Authentication** for operator access via the **Human Machine Interface**.
    - **Data integrity** checks in the **Database** (TimescaleDB) for logged crane states.
    - **Encrypted communication** (e.g., TLS) for MQTT/TCP/IP links, though not explicitly stated."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The **Digital Twin Hosting and Deployment** infrastructure is **on-premise** (local to the lab-scale gantry crane system) with the following technical specifics:
  - **Hosting Platforms**:
    - **On-premise** (no mention of cloud or edge deployment).
    - Services (e.g., **Trajectory Generator Service**, **Simulation Service**) run as **Python applications** on local hardware.
  - **Computational and Storage Requirements**:
    - **TimescaleDB** (a time-series database extension of PostgreSQL) stores all system data, requiring **high I/O performance** for time-series logging.
    - **Trajectory Generation** and **Simulation Services** demand **moderate computational resources** (e.g., CPU for kinematic calculations, RAM for trajectory buffering).
  - **Scalability Mechanisms**: Not explicitly detailed, but the **containerized architecture** (C4 Model) suggests modular scalability (e.g., adding more **Simulation Service** instances for parallel trajectory validation).
  - **Deployment Models Supported**:
    - **Monolithic-like** (services tightly coupled via **MQTT Broker** and **Database**).
    - **Service-oriented** (each container is independently deployable, e.g., **Dashboard** can be updated without affecting the **Control Application**).
  - **Availability/Reliability Assurance**:
    - **Continuous logging** ensures data persistence.
    - **Real-time validation** (via **Continuous Validation Service**) mitigates operational failures.
    - No explicit redundancy (e.g., backup databases or failover mechanisms) is mentioned, implying reliance on local hardware resilience."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin exemplars demonstrate **limited horizontal integration** with external systems, relying on **domain-specific, ad-hoc interoperability** rather than standardized protocols. The **GreenhouseDT** exemplar integrates:
  - **InfluxDB** (proprietary time-series database) for data storage,
  - **ActiveMQ** (open-standard message broker) for internal communication,
  - **Virtual Machines** (self-contained, no explicit API/standard for external data exchange).
  The **Air Quality Management** exemplar shows **partial integration** via:
  - **AutomationML** (industry-standard for engineering data exchange) for Digital Twin modeling,
  - **Microsoft Azure tools** (cloud-native services) for simulation/prediction, implying **vendor-specific dependencies** (e.g., Azure IoT Hub, Azure Functions).
  Neither exemplar documents **standardized interoperability protocols** (e.g., OPC UA, MQTT for IoT, or Digital Twin-specific standards like **DMTF’s Open Digital Twin Standards**). The **gantry crane system** lacks details on external integration but is framed within a **cyber-physical systems (CPS) context**, suggesting potential dependencies on **logistics/port infrastructure systems** (e.g., container tracking, warehouse management). **No explicit mention** of integration patterns (e.g., event-driven architectures, API gateways) or dependencies on enterprise systems (ERP, MES) is provided. The exemplars prioritize **self-contained operation** over cross-system interoperability."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin exemplars demonstrate **partial standardization** with the following compliance and interoperability approaches:
  - **GreenhouseDT**:
    - **Technologies**: Uses **InfluxDB** (open standard for time-series data) and **ActiveMQ** (open-source message broker), adhering to **de facto industry standards** for IoT/data integration.
    - **No Commercial Frameworks**: Explicitly avoids proprietary digital twin platforms, opting for **ad-hoc solutions**.
  - **Air Quality Management**:
    - **AutomationML**: Adopts the **AutomationML standard** (IEC 62714) for digital twin modeling, ensuring **interoperability** with industrial automation systems.
    - **Microsoft Azure**: Leverages **cloud-native tools** (e.g., Azure IoT Hub, Stream Analytics) but does not specify compliance with **ISO/IEC 25010** (systems and software engineering) or **NIST Digital Twin Framework**.
    - **Sensors**: Uses **Raspberry Pi with sensors**, implying adherence to **IEEE 1451** (smart transducer standards) or similar IoT sensor protocols.
  - **Gantry Crane**: Not in Document.
  - **Common Themes**:
    - **Open-Source Dissemination**: All exemplars are hosted on **GitHub**, promoting **reproducibility** but not formal certification.
    - **Interoperability**: **AutomationML** (Air Quality) and **InfluxDB/ActiveMQ** (GreenhouseDT) enable **data exchange** but lack cross-domain standardization (e.g., **OPC UA** or **FIWARE**).
    - **No Explicit Certifications**: Absence of mentions of **ISO 19650** (BIM/construction), **ISO 22400** (agricultural systems), or **IEC 61131** (industrial automation) suggests **domain-specific** rather than cross-industry compliance."
]
